name: USB Debugging SDB status
description: Verify SDB debugger connection status is disabled.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper usb debugging sdb status settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on USB Debugging SDB status. Attackers could exploit these unhardened parameters to launch privileges escalation actions.", "technical_impact": "Failed control allows unapproved subsystem bindings, breaking sandboxing isolation or inter-process communications.", "fix_steps": "Modify system properties. If automated, configure the parameter `sdb_enabled=0` in your config payload and deploy.", "config_example": "sdb_enabled=0", "validation_steps": "sdb shell tizen_check_security --control=UTSCF-PIO-01", "cost": "HIGH", "estimated_time_hours": 2}
